prose: Fukui reactivity indices for aniline were computed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The geometry was taken from the user-supplied aniline.xyz without re-optimization (single-point Mulliken charges on neutral, cation N-1 doublet, and anion N+1 doublet states). Density fitting was OFF (exact four-center integrals). The most nucleophilic site is N (atom 1) with f⁻ = 0.20452359; the most electrophilic site is C (atom 3, ortho carbon) with f⁺ = 2.2975867. All integrity checks passed (sum(f+)=1.0000, sum(f-)=1.0000); trustworthy: true. No warnings were reported. Method: chemkit fukui-reactivity skill, B3LYP/def2-TZVP, gas phase, charge 0, mult 1.
